jobs.title: Loans Bookkeeper
jobs.experience: Associates (Fresh Graduates are Welcome to Apply)
jobs.description: Responsible for the efficient processing of loan applications, proper documentation, and safekeeping of all loan documents.  Provides general lending information to customers, interviews and takes loan applications.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Finance, or related field

jobs.title: New Accounts Clerk
jobs.experience: Associates (Fresh Graduates are Welcome to Apply)
jobs.description: Is responsible for handling, filing and documentation of all deposit accounts.  Handles clients’ inquiries and processes account opening
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Finance, or related field
